case_title: PROTAX LLC VS. MOLLY WEST ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,920.07 FILED BY PROTAX LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, MOLLY O'KANE, PHILLIP D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROTAX LLC
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $86.50 SERVED OCT-04-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, MOLLY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-27-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF (SC-150)-FORM USED FOR RESET FROM PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROTAX LLC
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-02-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-02-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROTAX LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $43.75 SERVED OCT-04-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT O'KANE, PHILLIP D.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PAUL MATTHEWS--BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE OF REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROTAX LLC SERVED NOV-21-2014, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, MOLLY O'KANE, PHILLIP D.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROTAX LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST, MOLLY O'KANE, PHILLIP D. $1,920.07 PRINCIPAL, $180.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,100.32 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, MOLLY O'KANE, PHILLIP D.
